summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Global Access Shipping website. Critical authentication failure discovered - Supabase authentication is completely broken with 500 server errors. UI components and public tracking functionality work correctly, but all user authentication flows (registration/login) are non-functional.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error with 'unexpected_failure' error code
critical_bugs.impact: Completely blocks user registration and authentication flows

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 400 Bad Request during login attempts
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents existing users from logging in

integration_issues.issue: Registration form submits correctly but Supabase authentication fails with 500 error
Login form submits correctly but Supabase authentication fails with 400 error

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with proper branding and layout
Registration form UI renders with correct data-testid attributes
Login form UI renders with correct data-testid attributes
Public tracking functionality works (RPC call returns 200)
Navigation elements and buttons are properly implemented
Feature cards display correctly (4 cards found)
Form validation and input handling works on frontend
Supabase client connection established (non-auth operations work)
UI components have proper accessibility attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (UI works, authentication integration fails due to backend)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Supabase authentication configuration. The Supabase project at https://iixpwdwumfhrgnwqhuzi.supabase.co has authentication completely broken - signup returns 500 'unexpected_failure' and login returns 400 errors. Check: 1) Supabase project settings - ensure auth is enabled, 2) Database triggers for profile creation, 3) RLS policies that might be blocking signup, 4) Project limits/billing status. Public tracking works (RPC functions), so basic Supabase connection is fine - only authentication is broken.
